title: Senior Doctor - Solara Active Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Solara Active Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Solara Active Pharma in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Solara Active Pharma:
Solara Active Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma!
